name: Rogz Dog Utility Classic Harness Medium Red
shortDescription: Keep your medium dog safe and comfortable with the Rogz Dog Utility Classic Harness (Red). Adjustable, durable, and reflective for secure walks.
description: The Rogz Dog Utility Classic Harness (Medium, Red) is designed for comfort, safety, and control during walks. Crafted from durable materials, this harness evenly distributes pressure across your dog’s chest, reducing strain on the neck. Fully adjustable, it ensures a secure, custom fit for medium-sized dogs. Reflective stitching enhances visibility during low-light walks, keeping your pet safe. Easy to put on and remove, this harness is perfect for daily walks, jogging, or outdoor adventures.
